name: k6init
description: K6 TypeScript API performance test suite

scripts.run:grafana: npm run build && k6 cloud run --local-execution dist/jsonPlaceholderSimulation.js -e ENV=dev -e LOAD_PROFILE=fixed -e USERS=5 -e DURATION_SECONDS=30
scripts.smokeTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/jsonPlaceholderSimulation.js -e ENV=dev -e LOAD_PROFILE=fixed -e USERS=1 -e DURATION_SECONDS=10
scripts.rampTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/jsonPlaceholderSimulation.js -e ENV=dev -e LOAD_PROFILE=ramp-up -e INITIAL_USERS=1 -e USERS=20 -e DURATION_SECONDS=120
scripts.spikeTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/jsonPlaceholderSimulation.js -e ENV=dev -e LOAD_PROFILE=spike -e INITIAL_USERS=1 -e USERS=50 -e DURATION_SECONDS=120
scripts.peakTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/jsonPlaceholderSimulation.js -e ENV=dev -e LOAD_PROFILE=peak -e INITIAL_USERS=1 -e USERS=50 -e DURATION_SECONDS=180
